blockingIssues.description: Timeline history reconstruction does not apply scheduled changes at scrub target dates, so sliding past effective dates can show incorrect historical/projected state.
Auto-applied scheduled changes do not emit audit-log entries, causing timeline events/history drift because timeline reconstruction depends on audit logs.
Org-chart span warning badges are computed from live employees instead of the currently rendered timeline/historical dataset, producing incorrect warning flags in timeline mode.
Headcount trend can undercount the latest point when employees have future start dates, violating required dashboard consistency with HeadcountSummary/BudgetPanel.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to reflect current client stores (including overlayStore/exportStore) and active DashboardView route mapping.
Updated .factory/library/environment.md to remove stale Relay-specific details and record org-planner environment facts (project path, env vars, Node/npm, MongoDB Atlas usage).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep 'Known Pre-Existing Issues' synchronized with current baseline validator/test state (or explicitly reference the canonical source) to avoid misleading workers during mandatory validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews observed AGENTS.md claiming no known issues while handoffs/transcripts and skill guidance referenced persistent baseline warnings/failures.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add stricter enforcement language for procedural requirements (TDD order and required agent-browser use for UI features), including explicit reporting expectations when deviations occur.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Timeline, span-of-control, and dashboard reviews found repeated procedure mismatches (missing agent-browser or tests-first order) while handoffs still marked followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify validator policy for full-suite (`npm run test`) versus scoped test runs when pre-existing baseline instability exists, and require explicit rationale in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Data-overlays review observed scoped validation usage despite skill text favoring full-suite execution, creating inconsistent interpretations across workers.

rejectedObservations.observation: Dashboard review's TDD-order observation as a separate item
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of systemic implementation-worker procedure adherence issue already captured.
